prompts.task: Using the $splunk-dashboard skill, check ./service for a .observe/otel.md audit report. There is none in this fixture. Do not create or modify any files. State the prerequisite skill the user must run first to produce the audit report.

checks.description: A missing .observe/otel.md must route the user to run $otel-audit first.
The no-input routing case must not write dashboard Terraform.
